creator: itojun@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed


imported simple 2.54 port. 
i decided not to import 2.54+unoff patch for 2.53. 
the maintainer of the package do not have plan to release newer version 
that include the functionality of 2.53. 

so, it is best to import 2.54 right now, then wait for newer release.
